chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1138 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4691/2022 (C/A) 13-10-2022 Petitioner Abdul Raheem Noonari, present in person. Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for respondents No.5 & 6. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate, files power as well as statement on behalf of the alleged contemnors No.1 & 2. He also hands over three cheques, total amounting to Rs.1,89,786/-, to the petitioner holding CNIC No. 43205-0372236-3, who is present in Court. Petitioner has acknowledged receiving of the same on the statement filed by learned Counsel for the alleged contemnors. The statement is taken on record. Since the grievance of the petitioner stands redressed, listed contempt application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
